title: WALDPORT WEDNESDAY MARKET - 211info
text: WALDPORT COMMUNITY CENTER WALDPORT WEDNESDAY MARKET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a weekly farmers market with farm fresh, locally produced fruits, vegetables, meats, fish, dairy, herbs, flowers, food, and craft items. Provides support to local artists and farmers. 265 E Hemlock Street Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Visitors: Unrestricted Vendors: Must grow own produce, hand craft own merchandise, bake own goods or represent a marketed brand to sell at the market Hours: Wednesdays 10am-3pm (May-September) Set up: 8am Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visitors: Walk in Vendors: Fill out application online FEES: Visitors: None Vendors: $26 application fee. $15 fee for daily space paid in advance. $20 fee for daily space paid on event day. DOCUMENTS: Visitors: None Vendors: Online registration form and copies of up-to-date licenses, permits and certifications AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Lincoln County bus stops nearby at the Post Office Services: Farmers Markets Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - COMMUNITY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALDPORT COMMUNITY CENTER
